team.date_founded: Founded in the sealed subterranean warrens of Hygiea, where football is played far below the surface.
team.number_of_fans: Around 13 million, dwelling in the dark and proud of it.
team.badge: A shielded lantern glowing in a black tunnel mouth.
team.home_kit: Charcoal and deep green with a faint tunnel-light glow on the chest.
team.third_kit: Near-black with a single lantern emblem.
team.history: Hygiea United are masters of the dark arts of defending — a subterranean side built on impregnable structure who smother opponents in the gloom of The Dark Pitch and dare them to find a way through.
team.club_culture: Insular, disciplined, and defensively obsessive. The Shades trust the structure above all.
team.political_leaning: Belt-isolationist — a closed, self-sufficient warren that keeps the system at arm's length.
trophy_cabinet: A long record of frustrating better-resourced sides
legends: Umbra Vell — the sweeper who reputedly organised the league's best back line
achievements: Fewest goals conceded in the belt across multiple seasons

stadium.date_built: Excavated deep beneath the Hygiean surface.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the warren's life-support and mining guilds.
stadium.pitch_size: Compact and tight, perfect for a smothering block.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf under managed tunnel-light.
stadium.bio: The Dark Pitch is a low, dim, claustrophobic bowl deep underground where visiting players speak of losing their bearings — and of never finding a gap in the Shades' defence.

training_facility.date_built: A basic complex carved into a side-warren.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded modestly by the warren guilds.
training_facility.bio: The Dark Pitch Academy drills one thing above all: defensive shape, repeated until the block moves as a single shadow.

manager.appearance: Pale and quiet, comfortable in the gloom, gives little away.
manager.bio: Shadow Diallo is a defensive obsessive who has made Hygiea the hardest side in the belt to score against, drilling an impregnable block that thrives in the dark.
manager.playing_history: A sweeper who organised defences his whole career.
manager.playing_philosophy: Give them nothing. A clean sheet is a victory in itself.
manager.culture: The high priest of the block.

managing_staff.appearance: Watchful and precise, drills shot-stopping in the dim.
managing_staff.bio: Dim Osei perfects the goalkeeping that anchors Hygiea's famed defence, the last refinement on an already miserly block.
managing_staff.playing_history: A former keeper of long service.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: The keeper is the final word of the block. Make it unanswerable.
achievements: Coached the belt's tightest goalkeeping records

players.appearance: Solid and calm, master of the dim box.
players.bio: Clean Vasquez is the balanced keeper who anchors the Shades' famous defence with composure.
achievements: Most clean sheets in the side

players.appearance: Tireless and rugged, grafts the flank.
players.bio: Cleanse Torres is the workhorse full-back who covers the right channel without rest.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the heart of the block.
players.bio: Pure Kane is the team-first defender who keeps the Shades' shape immaculate.

players.appearance: Combative and hard, relishes the duel.
players.bio: Pristine Walker is the aggressive enforcer who wins the dark battles up front of goal.
achievements: Most duels won in the side

players.appearance: Balanced and watchful, reads the gloom.
players.bio: Sterile Rivera is the composed defender who snuffs out attacks before they take shape.

players.appearance: Inventive and rare, the lone creator.
players.bio: Vital Chen is the creative spark the defensive Shades pin their attacking hopes on.
achievements: Most chances created in the side

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the midfield shield.
players.bio: Heal Petrov is the team-first midfielder who screens the block tirelessly.

players.appearance: Balanced and steady, keeps the ball.
players.bio: Cure Morales is the composed midfielder who refuses to surrender possession cheaply.
achievements: Highest pass retention in the side

players.appearance: Strong and predatory, the lone spearhead.
players.bio: Vigor Park is the selfish target striker who must take the Shades' scarce chances.
achievements: Club top scorer in a low-scoring side

players.appearance: Direct and combative, supports the striker.
players.bio: Robust Kim is the aggressive forward who battles to win territory for the Shades.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, the wide threat.
players.bio: Vitality Okafor is the selfish wide forward who carries the rare counter from the gloom.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Remedy Tanaka is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Tonic Nakamura is the team-first deputy who keeps the block intact in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Salve Fischer is the promising young defender learning the Shades' dark discipline.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Balm Hayashi is the creative deputy who offers a rare spark from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Elixir Sato is the eager young finisher pushing for a place in the gloom.
